message: WMI-3 attacker content into authoritative position (allocated-content-into-field): content is installed into struct field 'psmgr_session.sk' — the position the confused consumer later follows as a trusted reference. [mechanism:allocated-content-into-field;indicates=WMI-3] [mem:struct=psmgr_session;field=sk;offset=216] [oracle:assert=sk holds trusted, not attacker-determined, content;assume=externally-originated content installed into the field]
